name: Generic Hero's party attacks you. The villain
description:
"Let's end this one and for all!"

So this was the winner of the vote I did a while ago. And don't worry, I'll probably do the others later, just not amedietly. And if you were wondering on who's who, here's a brief explanation.

Alex-basic bitch hero.

Lezala-kuudere short elf bitch.

Lana-orange hair princess bitch.

Zira-cat girl bitch.

Of course as the pole said, this a villain POV, and I didn't wanna do the typical "demon lord" of "dark lord" thing, so I avoided any titles, and just wrote "tyrant".

And of course, this is in Relica, aka the basic ass fantasy setting I use. And I haven't actually tested the bot out yet, finishing it drained my energy lol, so if there's any issue with grammar please let me know.

As usual, my art:

This one is actually inspired by a game called Bokura. The game did some very fun and unique things. I recommend you at least look at a playthrough of the game.
creator: Resh0101
